description: Analyze Twitter workflows with JustOneAPI, including user Profile and user Published Posts.

operations.description: Get Twitter user Profile data, including account metadata, audience metrics, and verification-related fields, for accessing user profile metadata (e.g., description, location, verification status) and collecting follower and following counts.

parameters.description: Authentication token required for API access.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique numeric identifier (Rest ID) for the X user.
parameters.name: restId

operations.description: Get Twitter user Published Posts data, including post content, timestamps, and engagement data, for account monitoring and content analysis.

parameters.description: Authentication token required for API access.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique numeric identifier (Rest ID) for the X user.
parameters.name: restId

parameters.description: Pagination cursor for navigating through long timelines.
parameters.name: cursor
